# artifacts/build/dist

Compiled deterministic distributables that are not PDFs belong here while they are being prepared for digesting, review, or packaging.

Accepted generated examples include app bundles, tarballs, zip files, generated API/reference bundles, and other reproducible byte outputs. Long-form documentation sites should use `artifacts/docs/` when that lane is the better fit.

Do not store receipts, proofs, evidence bundles, release manifests, catalog records, published layers, secrets, or source files here. Trust-bearing records belong in their canonical homes under `data/`, `release/`, or other governed roots.
